v1_boundary: Information-only placeholder. No e-invoice generation, validation artefact execution, live submission or authority acceptance claim.
v1_boundary_warning: UK is information-only in this app. No V1 file generation, validation artefact execution or authority submission is available.
legal_regime_summary: The UK pack is an information-only placeholder in this workbench. It records regime status separately from generator capability and does not enable V1 output generation.
scope: No UK V1 e-invoice file generation scenario is implemented in this app.
The pack exists to prove that the country-pack model can support non-generating regimes.
mandatory_format: No mandatory UK output format is configured for V1 generation in this app.
transmission_or_clearance_model: No UK transmission, clearance, reporting or authority workflow is configured in V1.
qr_signature_requirements: No UK QR or production signature requirement is configured for this info-only pack.
retention_or_audit_notes: The app should still record pack selection and boundary status if a user views this pack.
Generation controls must remain disabled for information-only packs.
v1_app_capability: No workbook-to-output generation profile is available for UK in Milestone 1.

official_sources.label: Open items and deferred country packs
